character_dossiers.name: Long John Silver
character_dossiers.biography: Tavern landlord with a one-legged left side, using a crutch. Tall, strong, with a large face described as plain and pale but intelligent. Known to customers as a cheerful and authoritative figure.

character_dossiers.name: Black Dog
character_dossiers.biography: A buccaneer mentioned as a wanted man. Recognized by the narrator as a former customer at the Admiral Benbow.

character_dossiers.name: Tom Morgan
character_dossiers.biography: An old, grey-haired sailor with a mahogany face. Part of the tavern's customer base.

character_dossiers.name: Ben
character_dossiers.biography: A runner associated with the tavern. Mentioned as a fast runner capable of pursuing Black Dog.

character_dossiers.name: Pew
character_dossiers.biography: A blind beggar who frequented the Admiral Benbow and was recognized by the narrator.
